root.m_Talk_ENG: Get ready, stray cat! We're going to where the explosion happened!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Get ready, stray cat! We're going to where the explosion happened!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: thinking... of that day...?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit! This isn't what I signed up for!
